title: bit better than minecraft
description:
This modpack adds little bit to minecraft. This modpack has so much new content. For example:
new bosses
new biomes
mobs
quests
lots of fun
body:
this is a modpack that adds some new biomes mobs and bosses to the game while staying as close as possible to the vanilla game. for example this modpack has biome makeover alex's mobs and cataclysm
